# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: gateway-default
spec:
  host: "gateway"

  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

      # The TLS mode is always mutual, since the service account that's used to access the gateway must also be present in the mesh.
      clientCertificate: /etc/certs/client-cert-and-key.pem
    portLevelSettings:
    - port:
        number: 443
      tls:
        mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: istio-ingressgateway # replace this with the name of your gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:

  selector:
   ISTIO_META_ROUTER_MODE: "namespaces"
   # To match all namespaces, set the following value to "all".

  servers:

   - port:
     number: 443

     name: https-gateway
     labels:
       name: istio-ingressgateway

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: gateway
spec:
  hosts: ["*"]

  # All of these match. The service name is ignored in this config.
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http-gateway
      protocol: HTTP

    - number: 443
      name: https-gateway
      protocol: HTTPS

  resolution: NONE
  endpoints:
    - address: "istio-ingressgateway.istio-system"

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
   name: istio-ingressgateway
spec:

   gateways:
    - istio-ingressgateway.istio-system/istio-ingressgateway

   hosts: ["*"]

   tls:
     # This virtual service specifies two TLS settings. For the first, we have an exact match for /, and a certificate matching that host.
    - match:
       - port:
           number: 443
         uri:
          prefix: "/"
      serverCertificate: "/etc/certs/istio-ingressgateway-chain.pem"
      privateKey: "/etc/certs/tls.key"

    # This virtual service specifies two TLS settings. For the first, we have an exact match for /, and a certificate matching that host.
    - match:
       - port:
           number: 443
         uri:
          prefix: "/"
      serverCertificate: "/etc/certs/gateway-default-cert.pem" # This cert is used only as a fallback when the service account in the mesh does not have enough permissions to access the gateway cert
      privateKey: "/etc/certs/tls.key"

    tcp:
    - match:
       port:
         number: 443
     route:
     - destination:
        port:
          number: 80
  
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: gateway-http
spec:

  gateways:
    - istio-ingressgateway.istio-system/istio-ingressgateway


  hosts:

    - "gateway" # Replace this with the name of your Gateway

  http:

   - match:
     - port: 80
       uri:
         prefix: /

     route:
      - destination:
          host: gateway
        port:
           number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: service-accounts
spec:

  gateways:
   - istio-ingressgateway.istio-system/istio-ingressgateway

  hosts:
    - "service-accounts" # Replace this with the host that should match your services account API.

  http:

   - route:
     - destination:
       port:
         number: 5003

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service-accounts
spec:

  host: "service-accounts"

  trafficPolicy:

    tls:
      mode: NONE

    loadBalancer:

      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
